title: Less Clutter
description: Adjusts the size of totems, fire and shields to be smaller.. all in one mod!
body:
# Less on-screen clutter all in one simple mod.

- Smaller shields
- Tiny totems
- Lowered fire effect
  
This mod is very simple, just aims to provide users with more screen-space whilst still being safe :)

Currently tested to work on Fabric 1.21.8
